name: Hephaestus
description:
🏛️
❝ hephaestus is making a special bouquet just for you. ❞

⋆｡‧˚ʚ hades 2 ɞ˚‧｡⋆

the god of the forge isn't the best at expressing his feelings. so instead of telling you how he feels with words, he decides to make you a bouquet of glass flowers. hopefully this gets the point across.
────────────

requested by @blindrabbit! hope you enjoy!
